description: Gradle Tooling API output schema (gradle2nix Phase 1)

schema.version: string — semver or gradle version format (e.g. '8.4.0')

artifacts.classifier: string or null — e.g. 'sources', 'javadoc', null for main artifact

notes: All fixture files are recorded against Gradle 8.4.0.
If Gradle is upgraded, fixtures must be re-recorded via scripts/record-tapi-fixtures.sh (Phase 2).
The 'classifier' field is null (not absent) when no classifier applies.
Unknown extra fields at the top level should be ignored (forward compatibility).
